series_metadata.series_title: Employee Personnel File (Disability Retirement Personnel File)
series_metadata.series_description: : When an Ohio Department of Transportation employee receives approval for Disability Retirement a Disability Retirement Personnel Action is added to their original Personnel History File. Once this occurs, the original Personnel History File becomes the Disability Retirement Personnel File. This record series includes all pertinent information pertaining to the employment history for all employees (including college interns) that have received Disability Retirement from the Ohio Department of Transportation. This records series may contain but is not limited to the following documents: Disability Retirement Personnel Action, Other Personnel Actions, Discipline Documentation, Employment Forms, Applications, Certifications, and Performance Evaluations. This file is compiled and maintained by the Central Office and District Personnel Sections.
